articles.title: META RELEASES SAM 2
articles.summary: Real time promptable segmentation for videos and images from Meta.

articles.title: APPLE SAYS ITS AI MODELS WERE TRAINED ON GOOGLE'S CUSTOM CHIPS
articles.summary: Apple said that the artificial intelligence models underpinning Apple Intelligence, its AI system, were pre-trained on processors designed by Google.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC FACES BACKLASH FOR EXCESSIVE WEB SCRAPING
articles.summary: Freelancer.com and iFixit CEOs criticized Anthropic for excessive and unauthorized web scraping by its ClaudeBot, which disrupted their sites. Anthropic claims to respect the robots.txt file and says it will investigate the issue.

articles.title: SMALL MOLECULE OPTIMIZATION WITH LARGE LANGUAGE MODELS
articles.summary: Two new language models were able to achieve an 8% improvement on the Practical Molecular Optimization benchmark by collecting a dataset of 100m molecules (40B token equivalent).

articles.title: THE LARGER THE BETTER? IMPROVED LLM CODE-GENERATION VIA BUDGET REALLOCATION
articles.summary: Using smaller models multiple times can improve code generation performance with a very similar inference cost.

articles.title: SELF-DIRECTED SYNTHETIC DIALOGUES AND REVISIONS TECHNICAL REPORT
articles.summary: 300k+ dataset of conversations and critiques to be used for open models. The dataset was mostly created using synthetics and is a powerful example of synthetic data working with open models.

articles.title: ACCDIFFUSION
articles.summary: A method that dramatically improves high resolution image synthesis by diffusion models.

articles.title: MOBILE AR WITH ROBUST DEPTH ESTIMATION
articles.summary: HYBRIDDEPTH is a depth estimation pipeline designed to tackle mobile AR challenges like scale ambiguity and hardware diversity.

articles.title: ENHANCING VISION TRANSFORMERS WITH NON-CAUSAL STATE SPACE MODELS
articles.summary: The Visual State Space Duality (VSSD) model is a new approach that improves vision transformers by addressing their high computational demands.

articles.title: APPLE FOUNDATION LANGUAGE MODELS
articles.summary: Apple has outlined the basics of its language models for its newly announced “Apple Intelligence” initiative.

articles.title: CHALKBOARDS AND WHAT THEY CAN TEACH US ABOUT GENERATIVE AI
articles.summary: This article reflects on using generative AI as a teaching tool, arguing the technology should be analyzed beyond its technical aspects, with consideration for its alignment with educational values. The author, while open to using AI, is cautious about its impact and emphasizes the need to articulate why certain tools are implemented in the classroom. The discussion draws parallels between traditional tools like chalkboards and AI, considering both for their cultural significance and pedagogical implications.

articles.title: THE EVOLUTION OF SAAS PRICING IN THE AI ERA
articles.summary: The traditional seat-based pricing model in SaaS is becoming obsolete with AI's capability to automate tasks. Companies are increasingly adopting work-based or outcome-based pricing models, which charge based on the amount of work AI performs or the outcomes achieved. While incumbents are still relying on seat-based pricing, startups are leveraging new models for competitive advantage and to reflect AI's value more accurately.

articles.title: 💻 > TIME FOR A NEW TERMINAL?
articles.summary: Warp is the terminal reimagined with AI, modern IDE-like editing, and collaborative tools for better productivity. To start, simply _brew

articles.title: install --cask warp;_ or **download Warp for Mac

articles.title: CRASH COURSE IN DEEP LEARNING (FOR COMPUTER GRAPHICS)
articles.summary: This article covers the construction and use of multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs), a type of fully connected neural network used in deep learning.
